---
title: "Getting Started With R And Quarto"
author: "John Lockwood"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# This is some markdown

Of course. Let's try a simple R code block:

```{r}
print("Hello!")
```

And now some python, using our installed Conda environment, which RStudio graciously agreed to read from environment.yml? We can hope...

```{python}
import numpy as np
print("Hello!")
print("Numpy version:", np.__version__)
```
